summary: El II Encuentro EXPANSIÓN Industria de Defensa reúne el lunes 16 de marzo a los líderes del sector de la Defensa en España, que debatirán sobre los complejos desafíos geoestratégicos y económicos. Leer

title: Elecciones 15M Castilla y León: Tres candidatos aglutinarán el voto
summary: El duro pulso entre Fernández Mañueco (PP) y Carlos Pollán (Vox) por el voto conservador y los esfuerzos de Carlos Martínez por frenar el declive del PSOE han marcado la campaña electoral. Leer

title: Fitch mantiene la calificación para España en 'A' con perspectiva estable
summary: La agencia de calificación Fitch revisó este viernes el 'rating' de España y lo confirmó en 'A' con perspectiva estable, apoyado en que pertenece a la eurozona, "lo que contribuye a la estabilidad institucional". Leer

title: Are Spaniards really that bad at queuing?
summary: While the British are famous for their love of forming orderly lines, the stereotype from abroad is that Spaniards are impatient and incapable of queuing properly. Here's why foreigners have it all wrong.

title: Your views: 'This has been the rainiest winter since I moved to Spain'
summary: Traditionally winters are dry in much of Spain. It’s the springs and autumns which are typically the wettest, but this winter has been different. This is what you think of the weather this year so far.

title: Americans in Europe: US finally slashes citizenship renunciation fee
summary: Following a long campaign by Americans abroad, the US State Department has finally announced that it will soon slash the high $2,350 citizenship renunciation fee by 80 percent.

title: Sleepless Morrissey blames Spain's noisy Fallas for cancelling gig
summary: British singer Morrissey on Thursday cancelled his concert in Valencia due to "lack of sleep" caused by the noise of the famous Fallas festival, currently underway in the eastern Spanish city.
